_comment: Social media accounts for auto-posting. Add multiple accounts under 'accounts'. Set real tokens in .env.

_schema.id: Unique account identifier used in code
_schema.name: Human-readable label
_schema.enabled: Set to false to skip posting to this account
_schema.page_id: Facebook Page ID or Instagram Business Account ID
_schema.access_token_env: Name of the .env variable that holds the long-lived access token
